sharedRules.name: Plague
sharedRules.description: Units affected by plague take 1 toxic damage at the end of their turn, then that unit discards a plague token. This damage cannot be reduced or ignored in any way (by tokens or armor) but cannot slay a unit. Gargamox units don’t take damage from plague and don’t remove plague tokens, but can still be affected by plague.

sharedRules.name: Infect
sharedRules.description: Jumps from the original target up to three times to up to three different characters, as long as each new character is adjacent to the previous.

sharedRules.name: Deathburst
sharedRules.description: Effect that triggers when this unit is slain.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.
